name: C# 10 Dev Container (Ubuntu + NVIM 0.11)
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y curl ripgrep fzf python3 python3-venv openssh-server && cd /tmp && curl -LO https://github.com/neovim/neovim/releases/latest/download/nvim-linux-x86_64.tar.gz && sudo rm -rf /opt/nvim-linux-x86_64 && sudo tar -C /opt -xzf nvim-linux-x86_64.tar.gz && sudo ln -sf /opt/nvim-linux-x86_64/bin/nvim /usr/local/bin/nvim
